name: McConnell AFB
profile: Military-friendly McConnell AFB housing snapshot anchored to Wichita / Derby / Andover, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Kansas VA loan rates.

notes: Property taxes and insurance materially affect true monthly ownership cost near McConnell.
Insurance and HOA should be included in all-in housing cost comparisons.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan estimate including P&I and Kansas property taxes

crime_status.installation: High security; gated military community. Extremely safe.
crime_status.metro_wichita: Wichita has higher property crime in city pockets; suburban Derby and Andover are highly sought-after safe alternatives for military families.

school_quality.on_base: None; students attend Wichita Public Schools.
school_quality.off_base: Derby and Andover school districts are consistently top-rated in the state.

rental_vacancy.notes: Adequate supply; Derby offers many newer rental options catering to military families.

rental_metrics.notes: Adequate supply; Derby offers many newer rental options catering to military families.

military_lifestyle_fit.description: The 'Air Capital of the World'; massive aviation presence and incredible community support.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: High value for dollar; mortgage payments are often significantly lower than local BAH rates.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Derby and Andover offer the best mix of school quality and long-term resale stability.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Steady 2.4% appreciation; market remains one of the most resilient and affordable in the Midwest.
market_bluf.verdict: BUY FOR CASH FLOW OR LONG TERM EQUITY

summary_points: McConnell Air Force Base sits in the Wichita / Derby / Andover housing market with base-specific affordability, commute, and neighborhood tradeoffs.
Current market trend is approximately 2.4% year-over-year, which should shape buyer leverage and pricing discipline.
High value for dollar; mortgage payments are often significantly lower than local BAH rates.
Neighborhood quality varies across Derby, Andover, East Wichita and other nearby corridors — citywide averages should not be the only filter.
Steady 2.4% appreciation; market remains one of the most resilient and affordable in the Midwest.
opportunities: McConnell military demand can support durable housing relevance for disciplined buyers and landlords.
Local inventory and pricing may offer opportunity for households that stress-test taxes, insurance, and commute together.
Derby and nearby corridors may offer stronger family or value positioning depending on assignment length.
Assignment-length clarity can improve rent-versus-buy decisions near McConnell.
risks: Neighborhood quality, schools, commute, and monthly carrying costs vary across the Wichita / Derby / Andover market.
Property taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities can widen the gap between list price and true monthly payment.
Market averages can hide weak submarkets — property-level review matters.
Some BAH profiles may be better served by renting than buying in this market.
buyer_notes: McConnell buyers should compare all-in monthly cost, not just principal and interest.
Verify school zones, commute timing, and BAH fit by exact address before signing.
Derby and Andover offer the best mix of school quality and long-term resale stability.
This market rewards disciplined buyers who test the commute during expected report hours.
seller_notes: Sellers should price against current inventory and days on market rather than older peak assumptions.
Move-in-ready presentation and realistic pricing matter when buyers have leverage.
Military-adjacent commute convenience can be a listing strength if framed clearly.
investor_angles: Military turnover near McConnell can support rental demand, but vacancy and maintenance should be modeled conservatively.
Investors should underwrite taxes, insurance, HOA, and property condition — not just acquisition price.
Practical commute corridors often outperform generic metro averages for military renter demand.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly payment as the primary screen.
Compare taxes, insurance, commute, school quality, and resale flexibility before locking a neighborhood.
Do not choose housing based only on distance to McConnell.
A slightly lower purchase price can materially improve monthly PCS flexibility.
seller_guidance: Price against active inventory and days on market.
Condition and presentation matter when buyers can compare more options.
Military commute convenience can help positioning if described accurately.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can improve occupancy durability near McConnell.
Model vacancy, repairs, insurance, and turnover conservatively.
Stable spread matters more than headline affordability alone.

base_profile.installation_type: Air Refueling / Tanker Operations / Mission Support
base_profile.host_or_major_command: 22nd Air Refueling Wing / Air Mobility Command
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: McConnell AFB is a major tanker installation in the Air Capital of the World supporting air refueling, mobility missions, and strong aviation-community ties.
base_profile.pcs_personality: The 'Air Capital of the World'; massive aviation presence and incredible community support.
base_profile.base_bluf: Steady 2.4% appreciation; market remains one of the most resilient and affordable in the Midwest.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, BAH fit, commute testing, childcare access, and total monthly housing cost before signing near McConnell.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize commute simplicity, affordability, rental flexibility, and access to daily services around Wichita.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: Lead with BAH realism, commute risk, school-zone confidence, and all-in payment math for McConnell clients — not generic Wichita / Derby / Andover stats alone.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near McConnell is influenced by PCS turnover, training/permanent-party mix, and practical commute corridors.

gate_selection_logic: Start with the user's likely duty location.
Identify the most realistic primary gate.
Compare the commute during the user's actual report window.
Do not choose a neighborhood based only on mileage.
commute_intelligence.user_instruction: Before signing a lease or contract, test the commute from the exact property address to the expected gate during the same time window you would normally report to work.

bah_market_reality.bah_bluf: McConnell housing decisions should compare BAH against rent, mortgage, utilities, debt, and commute. BAH is a decision filter, not a promise of affordability.
recommended_calculations: BAH with dependents vs estimated rent
BAH without dependents vs estimated rent
Total housing cost vs 30% income lane
Residual monthly income after expenses and housing
bah_market_reality.base_tab_message: Show BAH as a decision filter for McConnell, not a promise of affordability. Push users into PCSUnited financial calculators when the housing gap looks tight.

family_readiness.family_bluf: Families PCSing to McConnell should verify school zones, childcare options, medical access, commute reality, and housing availability before choosing a neighborhood.

childcare_guidance.cdc_note: Child Development Center availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified directly with official base resources.

before_arrival: Verify official gate and Visitor Control Center hours.

Tour properties before committing when possible.
first_30_days: Finalize housing only after comparing commute, BAH fit, school zones, and total monthly cost.
Save emergency, medical, gate, and housing office contact information.
Update PCSUnited profile and financial readiness dashboard with final housing numbers.

base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited is not an official DoD source. This Base tab is intended for public-facing PCS orientation, housing research, and relocation planning. Users should verify gate hours, access requirements, medical services, housing availability, school zones, and official procedures directly with the installation or official service provider before travel, lease signing, or home purchase.

parser_notes: This McConnell AFB file was upgraded to the Lackland-style PCSUnited schema with slug, name, state_code, profile, market_metrics, metrics, ownership_costs, costs, rental_metrics, summary_points, risks, opportunities, buyer_notes, seller_notes, investor_angles, and guidance arrays.
Wichita / Derby / Andover is preserved as the surrounding metro/submarket context; base-specific market data was retained.
property_tax_rate and insurance_rate are normalized to decimal form for deterministic math, with percent aliases preserved for display compatibility.

This file now includes base_profile for the PCSUnited Base tab, including gate orientation, visitor control center, major services, on-base housing, recommended nearby neighborhoods, commute intelligence, BAH market guidance, PCS watchouts, and source notes.
